data.name: Cyber Runner
data.detailed_description:
This is a fast-paced endless running and avoiding game. The levels are all randomly generated by the program and can be challenged forever.

Players need to control the characters to run forward and avoid obstacles on the left and right, and jump to avoid falling into the abyss.

Gameplay

  • Keep running forward and avoid obstacles.
  • Players can run left and right and jump.
  • Collect energy bar to accumulate higher scores.

Game Features

  • Support Steam leaderboard.
  • Support Steam achievements.
data.about_the_game:

  • Collect energy bar to accumulate higher scores.

Game Features

  • Support Steam leaderboard.
  • Support Steam achievements.
data.short_description: "Cyber Runner" is a small cyber-style arcade running and avoiding game. In the game, your only goal is to continuously break the score records you have previously created.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i5 Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 430 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • Processor: Intel i5 Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
